display.purpose: App wordmark and settings page titles only.

headline.purpose: Modal titles and settings section headings.

title.purpose: Ticket card titles and lane column headers.

body.purpose: Form copy, descriptions, and settings prose.

mono.purpose: API keys, MCP config, and code snippets.

shadows.name: lift-drag
shadows.purpose: Kanban drag overlay and mobile FAB.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition-all on buttons and controls.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default affirmative action; ink charcoal fill, tactile press.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.45rem; background: oklch(0.216 0.006 56.043); color: oklch(0.985 0.001 106.423); font-family: 'Source Sans 3', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out, transform 0.1s ease-out, box-shadow 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.216 0.006 56.043 / 0.8); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.709 0.01 56.259); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.709 0.01 56.259 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Header nav and secondary icon actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.45rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.147 0.004 49.25); font-family: 'Source Sans 3', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0.001 106.424); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.709 0.01 56.259); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.709 0.01 56.259 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-ghost.ds-active { background: oklch(0.97 0.001 106.424); color: oklch(0.216 0.006 56.043); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field; 32px height, ring focus.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Search tickets" aria-label="Search tickets" />
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; height: 32px; padding: 4px 10px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.923 0.003 48.717); border-radius: 0.45rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.147 0.004 49.25); font-family: 'Source Sans 3', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; transition: border-color 0.15s ease-out, box-shadow 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.553 0.013 58.071); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.709 0.01 56.259); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.709 0.01 56.259 / 0.5); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; background: oklch(0.923 0.003 48.717 / 0.5); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Ticket and settings container; ring-bordered, no shadow at rest.
components.html:
Payment failed on renewal

Customer reports card declined twice this morning.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; padding: 12px; border-radius: calc(0.45rem * 1.4); background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.147 0.004 49.25); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.147 0.004 49.25 / 0.1); font-family: 'Source Sans 3', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; } .ds-card-preview { margin: 0; font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.5; color: oklch(0.553 0.013 58.071); display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Status and metadata chip on ticket cards.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 20px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid transparent; background: oklch(0.216 0.006 56.043); color: oklch(0.985 0.001 106.423); font-family: 'Source Sans 3', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Header Navigation
components.description: Top app shell: wordmark + ghost nav with active wash fill.
components.html:
Ticqex
BoardSettings
components.css: .ds-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; height: 56px; padding: 0 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.923 0.003 48.717); background: oklch(1 0 0); } .ds-wordmark { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.147 0.004 49.25); text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 28px; padding: 0 10px; border-radius: 0.45rem; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.147 0.004 49.25); text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0.001 106.424); } .ds-nav-link.ds-active { background: oklch(0.97 0.001 106.424); color: oklch(0.216 0.006 56.043); }

components.name: Lane Column
components.description: Kanban lane container with status dot and count badge.
components.html:
In progress

4
components.css: .ds-lane { display: flex; flex-direction: column; width: 288px; border-radius: calc(0.45rem * 1.4); background: oklch(0.97 0.001 106.424 / 0.5); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.147 0.004 49.25 / 0.05); overflow: hidden; } .ds-lane-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.923 0.003 48.717); } .ds-status-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 9999px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-lane-title { margin: 0; flex: 1; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.147 0.004 49.25); } .ds-lane-count { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 20px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.97 0.001 106.424); color: oklch(0.216 0.006 56.043); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; margin-left: auto; } .ds-lane-body { padding: 10px; min-height: 96px; }

components.name: Ticket Card
components.description: Signature board card with title, badges, preview, and chips.
components.html:
Webhook timeout on deploy

agent

Retried 3x; last failure 4m ago on /api/v1/tickets.

emailpriority: high
components.css: .ds-ticket-card { padding: 12px; border-radius: calc(0.45rem * 1.4); background: oklch(1 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.147 0.004 49.25 / 0.1); font-family: 'Source Sans 3', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-ticket-head { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-ticket-title { margin: 0; flex: 1; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; color: oklch(0.147 0.004 49.25); } .ds-ticket-preview { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.5; color: oklch(0.553 0.013 58.071); } .ds-ticket-chips { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px; } .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; height: 20px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.97 0.001 106.424); color: oklch(0.216 0.006 56.043); font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 500; }

narrative.overview:
Ticqex is a solo operator's desk for supervising agent-driven support. The visual system is technical, direct, and quiet: a monochrome control surface where ticket state, actor, and channel read faster than decoration. Density is a feature, not clutter; every pixel earns its place on the Kanban board or in settings.

The palette is deliberately restrained. Ink-on-canvas neutrals carry the UI; color appears where it carries meaning (status dots, tags, destructive signals, unread counts). Surfaces stay flat at rest and lift on interaction: rings and muted washes define structure, shadows appear only when something is grabbed, focused, or floating above the board.

This system explicitly rejects generic SaaS helpdesk clones, AI-slop scaffolding, and consumer/playful UI.
keyCharacteristics: Monochrome-first with semantic color only (status, tags, errors, unread)
Compact controls (32px height) with tactile press feedback
Instrument Sans for headings, Source Sans 3 for body, Geist Mono for code
Flat tonal layering at rest; responsive lift on drag, FAB, and overlay states
Ring borders over heavy box shadows for card depth
Agent and human activity legible on cards before opening a ticket

rules.name: The Earned Color Rule
rules.body: Saturated color appears only when it encodes state: lane status, tag, error, unread, or user-assigned status dot. Never as hero background, gradient text, or decorative stripe.

rules.name: The No-Cream Rule
rules.body: Body backgrounds stay at chroma 0 (pure canvas) or cool-tinted wash. Warm cream, sand, and parchment tints are prohibited.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Instrument Sans owns headings and navigation labels only. Source Sans 3 owns everything else. Geist Mono is reserved for machine-readable strings.

rules.name: The No-Subtitle Reflex Rule
rules.body: Page titles stand alone. Do not add a muted paragraph under every h1 or h2 that restates the heading.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat and ring-bordered at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to drag, overlay, or floating panel state.

rules.name: The No-Glass Rule
rules.body: Backdrop blur and glassmorphism are prohibited unless solving a specific legibility problem over busy content.

dos: Do keep body backgrounds pure canvas or cool wash; tint neutrals toward brand hue at chroma ≤0.015 only.
Do use Instrument Sans for headings and Source Sans 3 for body; reserve Geist Mono for API/MCP/code strings.
Do show agent vs human actor, channel, and status on ticket cards without opening the modal.
Do use ring borders and tonal washes for depth at rest; add shadow only on drag, overlay, or FAB.
Do keep controls at 32px height with visible focus rings and prefers-reduced-motion safe transitions.
Do label buttons with verb + object (Save changes, Delete ticket, Create ticket).
donts: Don't use generic SaaS helpdesk patterns: purple gradients, hero metrics, identical feature-card grids, or marketing filler inside admin surfaces.
Don't use AI-slop scaffolding: warm cream body backgrounds, gradient text, small-caps eyebrows on every section, or numbered section markers as decoration.
Don't use consumer/playful UI: mascot energy, bubbly oversized radii, loud accent colors, or delight-for-delight's-sake motion.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards, list items, or alerts.
Don't apply saturated color as page background or primary brand wash; status and semantic badges earn hue.
Don't add subtitles under page titles that restate the heading; descriptions teach constraints only.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing; transitions use ease-out curves, instant under prefers-reduced-motion: reduce.
